prompt:
Declaration (in markdown format):

# Inbox Triage Rule

Apply to: urgent emails only

For each email:
1. Classify with gpt-5.5
2. Routing:
   - If spam → archive
   - If billing → route to finance team
   - If sender is VIP AND tone is angry → SMS notify Lyndon
   - Otherwise → leave in inbox

Schedule: every 15 minutes

Output a flat bullet list manifest of every concrete element this declaration implies.
manifest:
• Target scope: urgent emails only
• Classification model: gpt-5.5
• Classification step executes per email
• Spam classification outcome → archive action
• Billing classification outcome → route to finance team
• VIP sender condition evaluated per email
• Angry tone condition evaluated per email
• VIP sender AND angry tone → SMS notification sent to Lyndon
• All other emails (not spam, not billing, not VIP+angry) → left in inbox
• Schedule interval: every 15 minutes
• Processing is per-email within each scheduled run
